name: ineedagyro
description: Unless you're eating one right now, you probably need a gyro

scripts.dev: npm run build && printf 'YELP_API_KEY=%s\n' "$YELP_API_KEY" > .dev.vars && wrangler pages dev public
scripts.test: npm run build && c8 mocha ./test/**/* --exit --reporter spec
scripts.test_report: npm run build && c8 mocha ./test/**/* --exit --reporter mochawesome
scripts.test_coverage_html: npm run build && c8 report --reporter=html --reporter=text mocha ./test/**/* --exit

author: eebbesen
